creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to O. Hartmann from comment #0)

> … all users of FBSD 13.1 now are lacking www/glpi (as far as I can check …

Please recheck; see <https://www.freshports.org/www/glpi/#packages> and below. 

root@fuji:~ # freebsd-version -kru
13.2-RC6
13.2-RC6
13.2-RC4
root@fuji:~ # pkg search -oq -r FreeBSD glpi
www/glpi
root@fuji:~ #
